name_cn:
Black with silver buckle·
shopping tote bag_Horizontal shopping bag
A very minimalist, cool-toned series made from imported South African cowhide. It comes with a detachable clutch inside. Its features are large capacity and lightweight, paired with a small metal logo for an exquisite look!
